chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2287 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ Disposed of matter 1. For orders on CMA No.10101/2025. 11.10.2025 Mr. Muhammad Saad Shafiq Siddiqui, advocate for the petitioner. Sardar Zafar Hussain, advocate alongwith Mr. Muhammad Siddique, advocate for the respondent. 1. Per joint request order dated 20.03.2025 is hereby recalled and the petition is restored. By consent, petition is disposed of with directions that security put in place be subject to final outcome of the proceedings before learned Appellate Tribunal. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
